name: Sleeping Town
resumeError: The saved Sleeping Town game could not be resumed and needs to be restarted.

citizen.name: Citizen
citizen.shortDescription: Votes during the day and tries to find the killers.
citizen.objective: Eliminate every killer before they control the town.

killer.name: Killer
killer.shortDescription: Chooses a victim during the night.
killer.objective: Match or outnumber the living innocents.

doctor.name: Doctor
doctor.shortDescription: Protects one person during the night.
doctor.objective: Help the town by preventing night eliminations.

detective.name: Detective
detective.shortDescription: Investigates one person during the night.
detective.objective: Find suspicious players and guide the town.

jester.name: Jester
jester.shortDescription: Tries to be voted out by the town.
jester.objective: Win by being eliminated by vote.

home.summary: An offline assistant for the moderator to draw secret roles and run an in-person match.
home.objective: The town tries to find the killers. The killers win when they control the vote. Special roles help, confuse, and create bluffs.

flow.reveal: The app draws and reveals one role per person.
flow.night: The moderator runs the night in secret turns.
flow.vote: The town discusses, votes, and eliminates suspects.
flow.win: The app checks when the town, killers, or Jester win.

rules: Choose the players and configure special roles.
Pass the phone so each person sees their own role in secret.
After the reveals, the moderator runs the night and keeps actions secret.
During the day, run the vote in person and mark who left or whether there was a tie.

setup.title: Set up game
setup.emptyGroup: Your group is still empty. You can add guests below.
setup.killersHint: Recommended automatically based on group size.
setup.doctorHint: Protects one person during the night.
setup.composition: Composition: {{killer}} killer(s), {{doctor}} doctor, {{detective}} detective, {{jester}} jester, and {{citizen}} citizen(s).
setup.revealRoleOnDeathHint: Helps beginner groups understand the match.
setup.doctorCanSelfProtectHint: If on, choose how many times the Doctor can self-heal during the match.
setup.doctorCanRepeatProtectionHint: If off, the same person cannot be protected on consecutive nights.

play.onlyPlayer: Only this person should see the next screen.
play.fallback: This phase will be implemented in the next step.

nightIntro.title: The town sleeps
nightIntro.description: Round {{round}}. The phone now stays only with the moderator for secret actions.
nightIntro.stepOne: Ask everyone to close their eyes and stay quiet.
nightIntro.stepTwo: Tell them the Killers will be called first. Doctor and Detective come next if they are in the match.
nightIntro.privacy: Make sure nobody can see the screen before the night choices begin.

killerTurn.title: Killers wake up
killerTurn.description: Ask the Killers to open their eyes silently and point to a victim.
killerTurn.wakeScript: Killer, wake up and choose someone to kill.
killerTurn.sleepScript: After the choice, say: Killer, go back to sleep.
killerTurn.targetHint: Choose by name only. The killer who is acting is not shown as a target.

doctorTurn.title: Doctor wakes up
doctorTurn.description: Ask the Doctor to open their eyes silently and choose one person to protect.
doctorTurn.wakeScript: Doctor, wake up and choose someone to save.
doctorTurn.sleepScript: After the choice, say: Doctor, go back to sleep.
doctorTurn.targetHint: Options follow the configured self-protection and repeat-protection rules.
doctorTurn.empty: No valid Doctor target this round.
doctorTurn.fakeDescription: Call the Doctor normally so the group cannot tell the role is gone. Wait a few seconds, then continue.

detectiveTurn.title: Detective wakes up
detectiveTurn.description: Ask the Detective to open their eyes silently and point to one person to investigate.
detectiveTurn.wakeScript: Detective, wake up and choose someone to investigate.
detectiveTurn.sleepScript: After showing the result, say: Detective, go back to sleep.
detectiveTurn.targetHint: Choose by name only. The Detective is not shown as a target.
detectiveTurn.resultHint: Discreetly show the Detective the result for {{name}}.
detectiveTurn.fakeDescription: Call the Detective normally so the group cannot tell the role is gone. Wait a few seconds, then continue.

nightResolution.title: Resolve night
nightResolution.description: Check the result privately before waking the town.
nightResolution.pending: The actions have been recorded. Tap to apply protection, investigation, and possible elimination.
nightResolution.announceKilled: Town, wake up. {{name}} was killed during the night.
nightResolution.announceKilledWithRole: Town, wake up. {{name}} was killed during the night. Role: {{role}}.
nightResolution.announceNoKill: Town, wake up. No one was killed during the night.
nightResolution.attackKilledWithRole: {{name}} was eliminated during the night. Role: {{role}}.
nightResolution.attackNone: No one died during the night.
nightResolution.protected: The Doctor's protection prevented the elimination.

dayDiscussion.title: The town wakes
dayDiscussion.description: Round {{round}}. The group may discuss before voting for an elimination.
dayDiscussion.hint: Run the conversation in person. When the group is ready, move to voting.

voting.title: Voting
voting.description: Run the vote in person. In the app, mark only the final result to keep the match moving.
voting.eliminatedHint: Select the player eliminated by the group or mark a tie if no one left.

result.title: Game over
result.killersDescription: The killers matched or outnumbered the living innocents.
result.jesterDescription: The Jester was eliminated by the town's vote.
